headline: Basin rig count down one as prices rise
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was down one this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 241 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 287 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up three from last week at 547 rigs. A year ago, 584 rigs were active. The count shows that 408 rigs sought oil, up one from the previous week, and 130 explored for ...
